content:
# workflow-retrieval-failure-recovery - Overview

Workflow type: failure_recovery
Agent targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, local agents
Goal: Recover when local knowledge retrieval fails or returns irrelevant results.
Evidence: observed / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/retrieval-failure

When to use:
- /health fails
- /ui/search returns empty
- Search returns broad unrelated chunks
- Agent cannot access local path
- SQLite index missing

Inputs required:
- Error message
- Query attempted
- API status
- Available scripts

AI summary: If local retrieval fails, check API health, simplify or refine queries, rebuild index if missing, fix Windows/Bash paths, and report fallback evidence instead of silently using memory.

# workflow-retrieval-failure-recovery - Execution Steps

Workflow type: failure_recovery
Agent targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, local agents
Goal: Recover when local knowledge retrieval fails or returns irrelevant results.
Evidence: observed / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/retrieval-failure

- If API is down, start backend_api with uvicorn or fall back to search_ui.py.
- If search is empty, simplify query to one core term, then try synonyms.
- If results are broad, add style/page/component constraints or use a more specific query.
- If SQLite DB is missing, run make_chunks.py and build_sqlite_index.py for the relevant domain.
- If direct script path fails on Windows Bash, use forward slashes or call the HTTP API.
- If no knowledge exists, report the gap and optionally create a new reference record after research.

AI summary: If local retrieval fails, check API health, simplify or refine queries, rebuild index if missing, fix Windows/Bash paths, and report fallback evidence instead of silently using memory.

# workflow-retrieval-failure-recovery - API Calls

Workflow type: failure_recovery
Agent targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, local agents
Goal: Recover when local knowledge retrieval fails or returns irrelevant results.
Evidence: observed / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/retrieval-failure

- GET /health
- GET /ui/search?q={simplified_query}&limit=5

AI summary: If local retrieval fails, check API health, simplify or refine queries, rebuild index if missing, fix Windows/Bash paths, and report fallback evidence instead of silently using memory.

# workflow-retrieval-failure-recovery - Prompt Contract

Workflow type: failure_recovery
Agent targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, local agents
Goal: Recover when local knowledge retrieval fails or returns irrelevant results.
Evidence: observed / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/retrieval-failure

- Do not stop after one failed query.
- Retry narrower/broader queries before claiming no data.
- Distinguish no data from API/path failure.

AI summary: If local retrieval fails, check API health, simplify or refine queries, rebuild index if missing, fix Windows/Bash paths, and report fallback evidence instead of silently using memory.

# workflow-retrieval-failure-recovery - Verification

Workflow type: failure_recovery
Agent targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, local agents
Goal: Recover when local knowledge retrieval fails or returns irrelevant results.
Evidence: observed / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/retrieval-failure

- Recovery path returns chunks or a clear gap report
- The final report states the failure and fallback used

AI summary: If local retrieval fails, check API health, simplify or refine queries, rebuild index if missing, fix Windows/Bash paths, and report fallback evidence instead of silently using memory.

# workflow-retrieval-failure-recovery - Failure Modes

Workflow type: failure_recovery
Agent targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, local agents
Goal: Recover when local knowledge retrieval fails or returns irrelevant results.
Evidence: observed / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/retrieval-failure

- Treating path error as missing data
- Using too many keywords in FTS query
- Ignoring API startup state
- Silently falling back to memory

AI summary: If local retrieval fails, check API health, simplify or refine queries, rebuild index if missing, fix Windows/Bash paths, and report fallback evidence instead of silently using memory.

# workflow-retrieval-failure-recovery - Handoff Report

Workflow type: failure_recovery
Agent targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, local agents
Goal: Recover when local knowledge retrieval fails or returns irrelevant results.
Evidence: observed / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/retrieval-failure

- Original failure
- Fallback attempted
- Recovered result or remaining gap

AI summary: If local retrieval fails, check API health, simplify or refine queries, rebuild index if missing, fix Windows/Bash paths, and report fallback evidence instead of silently using memory.
